hero.title: International Tourism Assistant
hero.subtitle: Explore destinations shaped by rich culture, breathtaking landscapes, and thoughtfully crafted experiences designed to leave a lasting impression long after your journey ends.
hero.sentence1: WHERE EVERY TRIP HAS A STORY

destination.subtitle: Discover breathtaking destinations from Japan and Indonesia, curated for unforgettable travel experiences.

indonesia.label: Indonesia
indonesia.description: Connect with Indonesia's leading travel agencies that specialize in cultural tours, island hopping, and volcanic adventures across the archipelago. We partner with local experts to ensure your journey is authentic and seamless.

japan.label: Japan
japan.description: Collaborate with Japan's top travel experts to experience the perfect blend of high-tech cities, serene temples, and seasonal wonders. Our partners provide personalized itineraries to help you discover the hidden gems of Japan.

testimonial.subtitle: Real stories from travelers who’ve explored unforgettable destinations with our curated travel packages.

items.name: Angel Barbara
items.message: The trip was perfectly organized from start to finish. Every destination felt special, and the experience exceeded my expectations.

items.name: John Doe
items.message: An unforgettable journey! The balance between adventure and relaxation was spot on. I learned so much without ever feeling rushed.

items.name: Sophia Tan
items.message: Great service and very friendly team. The destinations were well curated and suitable for the whole family.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Intera and our travel services.

items.question: What is Intera?
items.answer: International Tourism Exchange Application (INTERA) is a destination exploration platform that helps you find the best places in Indonesia and Japan, and connects you with trusted travel agencies.

items.question: How do I search for specific destinations?
items.answer: You can use the 'Explore' page to search for destinations. Use the filter feature to narrow down results by country or categories such as Nature, Heritage, Volcanic, and others.

items.question: How do I book travel services?
items.answer: On the 'Travel' page, you can see a list of our partner agencies. Click the 'Contact' button to reach them directly for booking information.

items.question: Does Intera charge users any fees?
items.answer: No, Intera is a free curation and exploration platform for travelers to find travel inspiration and agency information.

items.question: Is destination information accurate?
items.answer: We perform deep curation for every listed destination and agency. However, we suggest always confirming operational details directly with the service provider.

items.question: How if I want to register my agency?
items.answer: We are very open to new partnerships. You can contact our support team via the chat feature for information regarding registering your travel agency on our platform.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Adventure?
cta.subtitle: Explore curated destination packages tailored to your travel style. From nature escapes to cultural journeys, our team is ready to help you plan a memorable and stress-free trip.
cta.whatsapp_message: Hello, I would like to ask about your destination travel packages.

footer.description: Your international tourism assistant for Indonesia and Japan.

explore.title: Explore Destinations
explore.subtitle: Find the best destinations from around the world that we have curated for the best experience.

travel_page.title: Find Travel Services
travel_page.subtitle: Discover trusted travel agencies for your next journey.

8f3c2a1d-7b9e-4f2a-9c5d-1a2b3c4d5e6f.title: Kawah Sikidang
8f3c2a1d-7b9e-4f2a-9c5d-1a2b3c4d5e6f.description: Sikidang Crater is the most accessible active volcanic crater in the Dieng area. Its geothermal activity is clearly visible through hot steam bursts and boiling mud pools that move around. This phenomenon makes it both educational and visually interesting. Visitors can also try boiling eggs in a small crater as a unique experience.

a7b8c9d0-e1f2-4a3b-8c7d-9e0f1a2b3c4d.title: Kompleks Candi Arjuna
a7b8c9d0-e1f2-4a3b-8c7d-9e0f1a2b3c4d.description: Arjuna Temple Complex is an ancient Hindu heritage estimated to date back to the 7th century. Surrounded by mountain landscapes and the thin mist typical of Dieng, this area provides a sacred and calming atmosphere. Besides its historical value, this location is often used for cultural activities and photography.

b2c3d4e5-f6a7-4b8c-9d0e-1f2a3b4c5d6e.title: Telaga Warna
b2c3d4e5-f6a7-4b8c-9d0e-1f2a3b4c5d6e.description: Telaga Warna is known for its water color change phenomenon influenced by mineral content and sunlight. The combination of green, yellow, and bluish colors creates a unique view. The area around the lake also provides light trekking paths with forest and mountain panoramas.

c4d5e6f7-a8b9-4c0d-1e2f-3a4b5c6d7e8f.title: Bukit Sikunir
c4d5e6f7-a8b9-4c0d-1e2f-3a4b5c6d7e8f.description: Sikunir Hill is a popular location to enjoy the sunrise with mountain panoramas. The climb is relatively short but provides spectacular views in the form of a sea of clouds and mountain silhouettes. The best time to visit is in the early morning.

d9e0f1a2-b3c4-4d5e-6f7a-8b9c0d1e2f3a.title: Arung Jeram Sungai Serayu
d9e0f1a2-b3c4-4d5e-6f7a-8b9c0d1e2f3a.description: Serayu River offers rafting activities with various difficulty levels. Besides the adrenaline rush, visitors can enjoy natural views of green cliffs and rice fields. This activity is professionally managed with safety standards.

e4f5a6b7-c8d9-4e0f-1a2b-3c4d5e6f7a8b.title: TRMS Serulingmas
e4f5a6b7-c8d9-4e0f-1a2b-3c4d5e6f7a8b.description: TRMS Serulingmas is a recreation park and zoo that provides wildlife education. Additional facilities like swimming pools and playgrounds make it suitable for families. The environment is well-maintained with an educational tourism concept.

f1a2b3c4-d5e6-4f7a-8b9c-0d1e2f3a4b5c.title: Surya Yudha Park
f1a2b3c4-d5e6-4f7a-8b9c-0d1e2f3a4b5c.description: Surya Yudha Park is an integrated tourism park with waterpark facilities, a cinema, and a hotel. This place is designed as a family entertainment destination with various interesting rides and complete facilities.

a9b8c7d6-e5f4-4a3b-2c1d-0e9f8a7b6c5d.title: Telaga Menjer
a9b8c7d6-e5f4-4a3b-2c1d-0e9f8a7b6c5d.description: Menjer Lake is a natural lake located at the foot of the Dieng Mountains, Wonosobo. Surrounded by green hills and cool air, this lake offers tranquil natural scenery and various tourist activities such as boating around the lake and enjoying the mountain panorama.

b8c7d6e5-f4a3-4b2c-1d0e-9f8a7b6c5d4e.title: Sumur Jalatunda
b8c7d6e5-f4a3-4b2c-1d0e-9f8a7b6c5d4e.description: Sumur Jalatunda is a giant well-shaped crater with high mythological value. Its extreme depth and legendary stories make it a unique tourist object. Visitors often try to throw stones as part of a tradition.

c7d6e5f4-a3b2-4c1d-0e9f-8a7b6c5d4e3f.title: Kawah Candradimuka
c7d6e5f4-a3b2-4c1d-0e9f-8a7b6c5d4e3f.description: Candradimuka Crater is known in puppetry stories as the place where Gatotkaca was formed. This crater has natural hot springs with sulfur steam. The location is relatively quiet and suitable for leisure travel.

d6e5f4a3-b2c1-4d0e-9f8a-7b6c5d4e3f2a.title: Curug Pitu
d6e5f4a3-b2c1-4d0e-9f8a-7b6c5d4e3f2a.description: Curug Pitu is a tiered waterfall hidden in a forest area. The natural atmosphere and the sound of water provide a relaxing experience. The trek to the location is quite challenging but rewarding for its beauty.

e5f4a3b2-c1d0-4e9f-8a7b-6c5d4e3f2a1b.title: D'Qiano Hot Spring Waterpark
e5f4a3b2-c1d0-4e9f-8a7b-6c5d4e3f2a1b.description: D'Qiano is a hot spring waterpark that utilizes Dieng's natural sources. Perfect for relaxation in cold temperatures, with various water rides and modern facilities.

f4a3b2c1-d0e9-4f8a-7b6c-5d4e3f2a1b0c.title: Koboku-no-mori Herb Garden
f4a3b2c1-d0e9-4f8a-7b6c-5d4e3f2a1b0c.description: A vast herb garden with hundreds of plant types providing a natural relaxation experience. Perfect for walking while enjoying the aroma of plants.

a3b2c1d0-e9f8-4a7b-6c5d-4e3f2a1b0c9d.title: Uzui Station
a3b2c1d0-e9f8-4a7b-6c5d-4e3f2a1b0c9d.description: A unique former station that is now a tourist park with valley views from a height.

b2c1d0e9-f8a7-4b6c-5d4e-3f2a1b0c9d8e.title: Dangyokei Ravine
b2c1d0e9-f8a7-4b6c-5d4e-3f2a1b0c9d8e.description: A natural ravine with unique rock formations suitable for trekking and enjoying seasonal changes.

c1d0e9f8-a7b6-4c5d-4e3f-2a1b0c9d8e7f.title: Mizuho Highland
c1d0e9f8-a7b6-4c5d-4e3f-2a1b0c9d8e7f.description: An outdoor resort that functions as a ski resort during winter and a camping area during summer.

d0e9f8a7-b6c5-4d4e-3f2a-1b0c9d8e7f6a.title: Kiri-no-yu Onsen
d0e9f8a7-b6c5-4d4e-3f2a-1b0c9d8e7f6a.description: Traditional onsen with indoor and outdoor pools utilizing natural hot springs.

f8a7b6c5-d4e3-4f2a-1b0c-9d8e7f6a5b4c.title: Hanamomo-no-Sato
f8a7b6c5-d4e3-4f2a-1b0c-9d8e7f6a5b4c.description: A peach blossom area that blooms in spring with a panorama of terraced rice fields.

a7b6c5d4-e3f2-4a1b-0c9d-8e7f6a5b4c3d.title: Kuki Silver Mine Ruins
a7b6c5d4-e3f2-4a1b-0c9d-8e7f6a5b4c3d.description: Ancient silver mine site providing insights into Japanese mining history.

c5d4e3f2-a1b0-4c9d-8e7f-6a5b4c3d2e1f.title: Suwa Shrine
c5d4e3f2-a1b0-4c9d-8e7f-6a5b4c3d2e1f.description: Historic shrine with an entrance flanked by large cedar trees, creating a sacred atmosphere.
